title: ClickUp Super Agents Explained: AI Teammates That Run Your Workflows
primaryQuery: What are ClickUp Super Agents and how do they work?
excerpt: ClickUp Super Agents are AI teammates that live inside your workspace — modeled as users you can assign, @mention, and put on triggers. Here's how they work, how they differ from Autopilot Agents, and how to build one.
notes: AI Automation track explainer on ClickUp Super Agents. Primary sources to cite during writing (gather dated references into the Claims table): clickup.com/brain/agents, clickup.com/blog/super-agents-launch, help.clickup.com 'What are Super Agents'. Internal links: /blog/what-is-an-ai-agent-a-business-owner-s-guide-to-autonomous-ai, /blog/ai-agents-vs-ai-automation-what-s-the-difference-and-which-do-you-need, /blog/what-is-ai-automation-a-plain-english-guide-for-business-owners.
